name_en: Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Large Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.
name_cn:
Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Large Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.
34 cm x 20 cm x 40 cm
🔎020146L-Space Black
